title: The Life-Changing Magic of Tidying Up
author: Marie Kondo
description: This book is a guide to decluttering and organizing your home and life. Marie Kondo introduces the KonMari Method, a simple and effective way to tidy up your space and transform your life.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: "Atomic Habits" is a practical guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones. James Clear explains how small changes can lead to remarkable results over time.

title: The Little Book of Hygge: Danish Secrets to Happy Living
author: Meik Wiking
awards: NEW YORK TIMES and SUNDAY TIMES BESTSELLER
description: Loosely translated, Hygge pronounced Hoo ga is a sense of comfort, togetherness, and weel-being. "Hygge is about an atmosphere and an experience," Wiking. explains. "It is about being with the people we love. A feeling of home.
